name: Complete Liquidation Treatment

eligibility.description: Requires a formal plan of redemption for all stock of the corporation. Distributions must be part of a series of distributions in redemption of all stock pursuant to that plan.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a series of distributions to be treated as a complete liquidation, potentially qualifying the distributions for capital gains treatment rather than ordinary dividend treatment.
